meta_description: Independent Funbridge review 2026. Pricing tiers ($15.99 Premium, $24.99 Premium+), Argine AI engine, ACBL masterpoints, bidding systems. How Funbridge compares to BBO. Verified May 2026.
bestFor: Intermediate-to-advanced players who want solo AI training and don't need ACBL masterpoints
pros: Argine AI is the strongest commercial bridge engine in 2026
Best mobile app design of any bridge platform
1-month free trial for new Premium subscribers
Post-game analysis compares your line against optimal play
Daily competitive deals keep the game fresh
name: Funbridge

sections.title: Getting Started on Funbridge
sections.body: Download the Funbridge app from the App Store or Google Play, or access it through a web browser. Registration is free and takes one minute. The app opens with an onboarding flow that surfaces the daily competitive deals — this is the format you'll use most. New subscribers get a 1-month free trial of Premium.

sections.title: The Interface: Best-in-Class Mobile-First Design
sections.body: Funbridge's interface is the most modern and intuitive of any major bridge platform. Cards are large and clearly rendered. The bidding box is easy to use on both desktop and touchscreen. The game flow — bidding, play, then analysis — is smooth and logical. The mobile apps are designed mobile-first rather than as ports of a desktop client, which shows in the polish.

sections.title: Argine: The Strongest AI in Online Bridge 2026
sections.body: Funbridge's AI engine — Argine — is the strongest commercial bridge AI as of 2026. Bidding is consistent intermediate-to-advanced, regularly updated by the Funbridge team, and designed to make the kinds of errors that human players make so practice transfers to real play. SAYC is the default bidding system; Acol is supported but secondary in polish. 2/1 system support is limited compared to BBO.

sections.title: The Replay Format: Why It Works for Improvement
sections.body: Funbridge's signature feature is the daily competitive deal system. Each day, new deals are published — every Premium subscriber plays the same hands against the same robots, and scores are compared across all players worldwide. This comparative element makes improvement measurable in a way that no human-partnered platform can match. You can isolate exactly which decisions cost you points and how the rest of the platform handled the same situation.

sections.title: ACBL Masterpoints and Funbridge — The Honest Answer
sections.body: Funbridge does not award ACBL masterpoints on standard play. The single exception is the eBridge Cup, an annual partnership event with BBO that does award ACBL masterpoints. If masterpoint earning is your primary motivation for playing online, Funbridge is not the right primary platform — use BBO or RealBridge. If you're playing for skill development, the absence of masterpoints is irrelevant — the value is in the deal volume, the AI strength, and the replay-comparison format.

sections.title: Pricing: Free vs Premium vs Premium+
sections.body: The free tier offers 2 deals per day and basic AI play. Premium at $15.99/month (or $159.99/year — about 17% cheaper) unlocks unlimited deals, ad-free play, and full match formats. Premium+ at $24.99/month (or $249.99/year) adds the digital Bridgerama+ magazine and advanced post-game analysis. Choose Premium if you play more than about 10 deals per week. Choose Premium+ only if you actually read Bridgerama+ and use the advanced analysis. Deal Packs ($5.49 for 50 deals or $22.99 for 400) are an alternative for players who don't want a recurring subscription.

tagline: The strongest solo AI bridge trainer on the market — Argine engine, replay-the-same-deals format, and approximately 170,000 active users in 2026.
cons: Standard play does not award ACBL masterpoints
Free tier is limited to just 2 deals per day
Premium costs $15.99/month — more expensive than BBO+
Limited live human play compared to BBO
2/1 bidding system support is less complete than BBO
og_description: Independent Funbridge review: Argine AI, replay format, pricing tiers, ACBL masterpoints. Verified May 2026.

faq.a: Standard Funbridge play does not award ACBL masterpoints. The single exception is the annual eBridge Cup, a partnership event with BBO that does award ACBL points. If masterpoints are your primary goal, pair Funbridge with BBO.

The free tier offers 2 deals per day. Premium costs $15.99/month or $159.99/year (about 17% cheaper). Premium+ costs $24.99/month or $249.99/year and adds Bridgerama+ and advanced analysis. New subscribers get a 1-month free trial of Premium.

faq.q: What is the Funbridge Argine AI?
faq.a: Argine is Funbridge's proprietary AI bidding and play engine. As of 2026 it is the strongest commercial bridge AI available. It plays at a consistent intermediate-to-advanced level and is regularly updated. SAYC is the default system; Acol is supported.

faq.q: Can I play against humans on Funbridge?
faq.a: Funbridge's primary format is solo play against AI opponents. There are some human tournament events, but the platform is primarily designed for solo training. For regular human play, BBO or RealBridge are better choices.

Funbridge is friendly for beginners because you can play at your own pace without partner pressure. The post-game analysis is educational. However, the free tier's 2 deals per day limit is restrictive — a Premium trial is recommended to get real learning value.

overview: Funbridge, published by Goto Games, is the premium solo training platform for bridge in 2026 — approximately 170,000 active users, the proprietary Argine bidding engine, and a unique replay-the-same-deals format that lets you compare your score against the rest of the platform. Originally French (it remains dominant in France), Funbridge is now genuinely international and particularly strong among intermediate-to-advanced improvers who want structured training without partner pressure. Important caveat for North American players: standard Funbridge play does not award ACBL masterpoints. The eBridge Cup (an annual partnership with BBO) is the single exception.
verdict: Funbridge is the right platform for any intermediate-to-advanced player who wants to improve methodically without scheduling a partner. The Argine engine is the strongest AI in online bridge in 2026 and the replay format makes progress measurable. North American players should know that standard play does not award ACBL masterpoints — pair Funbridge with BBO if masterpoints matter to you.
meta_title: Funbridge Review 2026 — AI Bridge Trainer, Pricing & ACBL Masterpoints
